## рҹ“Ҡ Executive Summary
Per 29 June 2026, kondisi pasar **NEGATIF** рҹ”ҙ вҖ” mayoritas komoditas downtrend.
- 6 komoditas uptrend, 11 downtrend, 17 sideways
- Rata-rata confidence level: 3.7/5 вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ
- вҡ пёҸ **1 anomali signifikan** terdeteksi (pergerakan >10%)

| Cabai Merah | Rp46,500 | Rp45,480 | Rp45,150 | рҹҹЎвҶ’ | +38 | 4.8% | вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ |
| Daging Sapi | Rp134,000 | Rp128,880 | Rp128,990 | рҹҹЎвҶ’ | +52 | 3.6% | вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ |
| Gula Pasir | Rp17,500 | Rp16,980 | Rp16,760 | рҹҹЎвҶ’ | +47 | 3.7% | вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ |
| Minyak Goreng | Rp19,400 | Rp19,420 | Rp19,845 | рҹ”ҙвҶ“ | -66 | 4.8% | вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ |
| Telur Ras | Rp29,300 | Rp28,740 | Rp28,055 | рҹҹўвҶ‘ | +94 | 2.3% | вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ |

## вҡ пёҸ Anomali & Alert
- рҹ”ҙ **sentimen_score**: -153.8% (0 вҶ’ -0)
- рҹҹў **sembako_Cabai Merah**: +9.8% (42,800 вҶ’ 47,000)
- рҹҹў **pet_Ayam_Hidup**: +9.5% (30,600 вҶ’ 33,500)

- рҹ”ҙ **sembako_Minyak Goreng**: -8.1% (20,900 вҶ’ 19,200)

## рҹҢҷ Konteks Musiman
- рҹҹЎ **Harvest**: komoditas pertanian turun

## вҡ пёҸ Risk Assessment
- рҹ”ҙ **Volatil**: Jagung Pipilan (Rp/k, Bungkil Kedelai (Rp/, Dedak Padi (Rp/kg) вҖ” volatility >5%, berisiko fluktuasi tajam
- рҹ”ҙ **Downtrend**: Minyak Goreng, score, Jagung Pipilan (Rp/k вҖ” tekanan jual berkelanjutan
- рҹ”ҙ **Crash detected**: 1 komoditas turun >10%
- рҹҹЎ **Confidence rendah**: USD_IDR, EUR_IDR, SGD_IDR вҖ” data kurang, prediksi kurang reliable

## рҹ’Ў Rekomendasi Berbasis Data
**рҹҢҫ Petani & Peternak:**
- вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ Telur uptrend kuat вҖ” **perluasan produksi menguntungkan**

**рҹӣ’ Konsumen:**
- вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ **Harga naik signifikan**: Telur Ras, Gula Pasir, Daging Sapi вҖ” beli seperlunya

**рҹ“Ҳ Investor:**
- Diversifikasi: 40% pasar uang, 30% ekuitas, 20% komoditas, 10% crypto

## рҹҺҜ Prediksi 7 Hari ke Depan
рҹӣ’ **Sembako**: рҹҹЎ **Sideways/Mixed** (вҶ‘1 вҶ“1 | ROC rata-rata: +1.4%)

**Faktor yang perlu dipantau:**
- Kebijakan BI Rate berikutnya (apotek moneter)
- Sentimen global: Fed rate decision, crypto regulation
- Cuaca: potensi El NiГұo affect pertanian
- Musiman: komoditas pertanian turun

---
_Analisis komprehensif | 29 June 2026 | 1757 data points | 39 indikator | 1 korelasi_
